calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Myers for (executor) Doreen Carter.

Mr. Myers reported that all expenses were in the report, that the beneficiaries in New England wanted to express their consent and knowledge of the travel expenses to the court, acknowledged that the meals and hotel expenses were high and that he had responded to the examiner's notes.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Continued To Mar-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Creditor'S Claim
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Myers on behalf of the firm as a Creditor.

Mr. Myers stated that there was an advanced health care directive, a HIPAA release and a number of other ancilary documents that were prepared. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Creditor's Claim (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Reimbursement For Travel Expenses To Inititate Probate.
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
